MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant City And County Of San Franciscos Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Roach, Esq.415-851-4557 for Plaintiff.
Renee Rosenblit, Deputy City Attorney 415-554-3800 of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court raises 3 issues: dangerous condition, creation of the condition and constructive notice. Both sides argue. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant City And County Of San Franciscos Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

***After the hearing, an Order Denying Summary Judgment Motion is signed. (see scanned order for details)***
